title: How did Ritsuko defeat Iruel
wikitext:
[]: How did Ritsuko defeat Iruel? Post by Silvery » Mon Dec 27, 2010 2:20 am (Iruel is the particulate angel that infects the Magi) I've rewatched the episode, but I don't really understand it--Gendo says something in the episode about things evolving so far they die, and Ritsuko says she somehow uploads a kill code to the angel, but that really doesn't make sense. Why would an angel, shown through the entire episode to be very good at fighting for its own survival, just suddenly kill itself? Ritsuko also says something about making it realize that it has to cohabitate with Magi to survive, but that too doesn't explain how it would get killed. I have a few theories, but I'm just wondering if there's something obvious I'm overlooking?

[]: Post by Ornette » Mon Dec 27, 2010 3:16 am Check out this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7814

Post by Silvery » Mon Dec 27, 2010 2:20 am (Iruel is the particulate angel that infects the Magi) I've rewatched the episode, but I don't really understand it--Gendo says something in the episode about things evolving so far they die, and Ritsuko says she somehow uploads a kill code to the angel, but that really doesn't make sense. Why would an angel, shown through the entire episode to be very good at fighting for its own survival, just suddenly kill itself? Ritsuko also says something about making it realize that it has to cohabitate with Magi to survive, but that too doesn't explain how it would get killed. I have a few theories, but I'm just wondering if there's something obvious I'm overlooking?
